name: Sarkaar
overview: Sarkaar- Mee Paate Naa Aata, Is The Telugu First Bidding Based Game Show, Hosted By The Energetic Pradeep Machiraju Which Leaves You On A High Spirit Note.This Show Features Celebrities Actively Participating And Fun Evolves With Every Round As The Participant Will Not Leave Any Chance To Loose

trailers.title: Sarkaa₹ Promo | Pradeep Machiraju | Game Show | An aha Original | Premieres October 29
